sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113811" key="xe/rnimma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χέρνιμμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n113811.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">washing of the hands,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0492.tlg001:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philonid.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
